message:
test(session_store): expand inline tests from 4 to 40

Bead: ft-2nhva

Add 36 tests covering: config defaults/custom, empty store behavior,
key count tracking, TTL expiry per key type, overwrite semantics,
validation (empty/whitespace IDs), edge cases (zero/max IDs, empty/large
values), key type independence, delete idempotency, key format, and
error display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
